mainHtml:
Home/Solutions/Instant Quoting

Complete Instant Quoting Like a Conversation

Instant Quoting starts from an AI conversation, guiding users to describe part requirements while lightweight forms collect material, quantity, process, finish, lead time and quality requirements at key moments. The system summarizes the conversation for AI analysis, returns a price range, lead-time judgment and risk notes, and can hand complex or uncertain requests to engineers for manual quotation.

Start QuotingView Conversation Flow
AI Quoting AssistantCollecting Requirements
Hello, describe the part use, upload drawings, or tell me the material and quantity. I will organize them into quotation inputs.
Aluminum housing, CNC machined, first batch of 50 pcs, black anodized, preferably delivered within 7 days.
Please Confirm Key Fields
Materials6061 aluminum alloy
Quantity50 pcs
Surface Finishingblack anodizing
AI AnalyzingPrice range / lead time / risk

Collect Quotation Information by Conversation

Users do not need to complete a long form at once. They can describe requirements as if chatting with an AI assistant. The system identifies missing information during the conversation and uses lightweight forms to complete key fields, turning scattered descriptions into quote-ready structured data.

Part UseDrawings and ModelsMaterial and ProcessQuantity and BatchSurface FinishingTolerance and InspectionLead Time Target

Form Checkpoints

  • Ask follow-up questions when material, quantity or lead time is missing
  • Offer options for confirmation when descriptions are unclear
  • Prompt for drawings or models when file information is insufficient
  • Save every confirmation as quotation fields

AI Summarizes and Returns Quotation Judgment

The system summarizes conversation and form information for AI manufacturing evaluation, outputs quotation results users can understand directly, and keeps the full context needed for engineering review.

Requirement SummaryAutomatically organize key parameters such as material, process, quantity, finish, tolerance, inspection and lead time.
Numerical AnalysisJudge price range, delivery cycle, cost drivers and optimization directions based on the manufacturing route.
Risk NotesFlag items requiring review, such as missing drawings, complex structures, uncertain processes or tight lead times.

AI and Engineers Quote Together

Instant Quoting does not leave every project to machine judgment. AI first handles efficient collection and preliminary analysis, then hands complex requirements to engineers for review so both speed and reliability stay in place.

AI Initial JudgmentQuickly return reference resultsFor complete and rule-clear requests, directly generate price range, lead-time judgment and manufacturing suggestions.
Manual ReviewComplex projects transfer to engineer quotationWhen model judgment is insufficient or requirements carry risk, synchronize structured information and chat context to engineers.
Result ReturnQuotation content returns to users in one flowEngineer-confirmed price, lead time, process notes and precautions return to the user quotation page.

Start with one sentence and let AI guide the quote

Describe the part, upload a model or add drawings. The system asks step by step and organizes quotation information, while complex requests transfer to engineers.

Start Quoting
